description_long: This object is a wooden mallet-shaped barrel or bucket with a cylindrical body featuring a realistic wood grain texture. The top surface is decorated with a large, embossed pink star set against a pale green background, bordered by a beige rim. A small, round wooden knob is attached to the side, and a cylindrical handle extends from the base, also textured to resemble wood. The bottom edge of the barrel is finished with a white band, and the interior appears hollow, suggesting it can hold contents. The overall craftsmanship and painted details give it a playful, toy-like appearance, reminiscent of props used in games or themed urban parks.
description: A wooden, mallet-shaped barrel or bucket with a pink star on top, a side knob, and a cylindrical handle, featuring detailed wood grain and painted accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical wooden body with a side knob and the white band at the base.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the handle extending from the base and the hollow interior with colored rim.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the pink star on a pale green surface, surrounded by a beige rim and the handle below.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1 but with the handle and knob on opposite sides.
